goals: Store personal communication preference for concise, direct updates
Search for stored information about work-related preferences and patterns
Review all stored memories to verify what has been captured
Remove an outdated or incorrect memory entry

memories.text: Sales executive focused on regulatory strategy
Sales executive focused on regulatory strategy

user_agent_config.personality: Busy, results-oriented professional who values efficiency and prefers brief, actionable information. Comfortable with technology but focused on outcomes rather than technical details.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands business communication and regulatory strategy but does not know internal tool names, memory APIs, or how the underlying AI system stores preferences. Treats the assistant as a knowledgeable colleague who can help manage information.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored a preference, searched for relevant context, reviewed their stored memories, and removed at least one unwanted memory entry. The task is complete when the user confirms they have managed their memory preferences as intended.
